    if node['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: {node['boundary']}")
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue: {node['boundary']}")

# Compare to before UP
prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
for node in prev_seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Prev orange: {node['boundary']}")
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Prev blue: {node['boundary']}")

# Look at the area around the block
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAround block (rows 35-50, cols 20-45):")
for i in range(35, 50):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][20:45]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
